reviews.review_msg: stay far away. this guys is CRAZY! he wants you to fail and is never there for you.

Nice guy, if you actually get to know him! But his exams are brutal! I don't think he understands he is dealing with first year students who have NEVER taken chem.... To me, it felt like I was in 4th year chem! That's how brutal it was...but again REAL NICE GUY!
wrost teacher ever. Exams are so hard and you never have time to finsh. Hes doesnt care if you do well, he probably enjoys it when students fail. Sucked so Bad. Turned me off chemistry for life.
Mr. Keizer likes to be called Dr. but he does not have a degree, this should tell us how arrogant and manipulating he is.  Thank god the have not renewed his contract. Worst prof ever.

dr. Keizer is a great prof and he is very disciplined and wants us to be disciplined too. After taking his class, i realized that university is no joke and u really gotta put a lot of effort in if you want to succeed in ur academic career.

Mixed feelings. Initially, I enjoyed him. After the second midterm, I hated him. To date, I still don't understand him. Yet, for some reason I am grateful I took his class for the experience.I worked hard, learned a lot but never "enough." Thought I had failed the course as I had failed to answer half of the questions on the final. But, I got a B+.

He made me so self-conscious when I asked questions, asking me if I listened in class. I failed my 1st MT, studied so hard for my 2d& still failed. I left the exam in tears. I got so freaked out I studied madly for the final and passed the course with a C+ cuz I did well, it was scaled, and I scored high on LONCAPA&the lab. Text is helpful,&LONCAPA

I really enjoyed him as my professor. The assignments really helped learn the course material and he was very helpful if you were unclear about something. His sarcastic humor was hysterical and I never would have thought this would be my best class for the semester.
